changes.old: a whirlwind of tiny needles of ice that lacerated the skin
changes.new: a whirlwind of tiny needles of ice that grazed the skin
changes.reason: Restores Gemini's 'grazed'; scalfire means to scratch/graze the surface lightly, not 'lacerated' (tear/mangle) which overstates the violence.
changes.context_sentence: s, a frozen sleet — nay, a whirlwind of tiny needles of ice that grazed the skin, that tormented my eyes,
